summary: Exceptional soundboard recording with crystal‑clear audio; the concert itself is praised as top‑rate.
review: The reviewer raves about the astonishing clarity of this capture, saying it makes a matrix unnecessary and calling it one of the best recordings they've heard. They also note that the performance was “top rate,” though no specific songs are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, highly detailed 5‑star review praises both the audio fidelity and overall show quality, indicating an outstanding performance and excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear, no matrix needed; reviewer describes it as “shockingly good” and a “hell of a job” by the recorder.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer calls the show "top rate" but provides no detail on set structure or specific moments.
